message:
🌱 Add tikv: TiKV running over 2 years may panic mission (#1022)

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,80 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "tikv-11940-tikv-running-over-2-years-may-panic",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "tikv: TiKV running over 2 years may panic",
+    "description": "TiKV running over 2 years may panic. This issue affects 7+ users.",
+    "type": "troubleshoot",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Identify tikv troubleshoot symptoms",
+        "description": "Check for the issue in your tikv installation:
```bash
tikv-server --version
```
Look for error: `:AssertUnwindSafe<F> as core::ops::function::FnOnce<()>>::call_once\n             at /rustc/2faabf579323f5252329264cc53b`"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review tikv configuration",
+        "description": "Review the relevant tikv configuration:
## Bug Report



### What version of TiKV are you using?
`nightly`(this case also appears on v3.0.5)

### What operating system and CPU are you using?


### Steps to reproduce


Running TiKV for 795 days, then some RPC failure may cause"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for TiKV running over 2 years may panic",
+        "description": "### What is changed and how it works?

Issue Number: Close #11940

What's Changed:

```commit-message
*: hotfix panic from tokio-timer by enlarging the length of the level vector
```

`tokio-timer 0.2.13`'s time wheel works when the elapsed time since the process starting is less than `2^36
```yaml
tiup playground --tiflash=0 --monitor=false
sudo kill {pid_of_pd}
sudo ./watchmaker -pid {pid_of_tikv} -sec_delta 68719436 -clk_ids=CLOCK_MONOTONIC
```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Upgrade tikv to include the fix",
+        "description": "If the fix is included in a newer release, upgrade tikv:
```bash
# Check current version
tikv-server --version
# Follow the project's upgrade guide at https://github.com/tikv/tikv
```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Confirm TiKV running over 2 years may panic is resolved",
+        "description": "Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:
Test tikv to confirm the issue is resolved.
Confirm that `:AssertUnwindSafe<F> as core::ops::function::FnOnce<()>>::call_once\n             at /rustc/2faabf579323f5252329264cc53b` no longer appears."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "### What is changed and how it works?

Issue Number: Close #11940

What's Changed:

```commit-message
*: hotfix panic from tokio-timer by enlarging the length of the level vector
```

`tokio-timer 0.2.13`'s time wheel works when the elapsed time since the process starting is less than `2^36 ms`(about 795 days), otherwise, it may panic.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "tiup playground --tiflash=0 --monitor=false
sudo kill {pid_of_pd}
sudo ./watchmaker -pid {pid_of_tikv} -sec_delta 68719436 -clk_ids=CLOCK_MONOTONIC",
+        "Signed-off-by: you06 <you1474600@gmail.com>
